title: Firefly Bush to Cattails (Toasty's Forbidden Corndogs)
description: Changes the Firefly Bush to Cattails
body:
[As seen on Enderverse's recent video!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hW90vIhCndo&t=509s)

This project changes the Firefly Bush to a custom 3d Cattails model. why? it look pretty.

Made in blockbench by me. Should work in all versions that firefly bushes exist.

Only cons:
- Break particles are a little funky and isk how to fix them
- because i changed the height, you can place a block on top of it and cut it off. on the plus side, corndog stand build hack!

anyway, have fun! :D
